title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Adani Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Adani Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Adani Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adani Enterprises:
Adani Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises!
